name: hpc-agentic-marketplace
description: Maintain the HPC-Agentic-SDK marketplace, including plugin metadata, skills, MCP launchers, and user-local configuration contracts.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain plugins in the HPC-Agentic-SDK marketplace.
interface.longDescription: Guidance for adding and updating plugins, skills, and MCP launch metadata while keeping user-specific configuration in documented local URIs.
